text:
MOBILE APP DESIGN
& DEVELOPMENT PROJECT
PROPOSAL
Project Title: Go Daikin Mobile App (Phase 4)
Revision: 1.4
Revised on: 06 December 2024
Prepared for: Teoh Kuang Yee, Daikin Malaysia Sdn. Bhd.
Prepared by: Adrian Ching, Upstack Studio Sdn. Bhd.

Scopes
The list below lays out the scope of work that will be carried out throughout
the entire course of this project.
User Interface/Experience Design
The visual aspect of the mobile app will be designed with high fidelity. Visual
representations/ interpretations for each page will be produced to illustrate the idea of
what the final product will look like.
Deliverables: Prototype (Figma).
Frontend Development
After all visual designs have been finalized, the designs will be converted into working
mobile applications using React Native. We will be working closely with the Daikin
Malaysia team for the development of the serverless backend on AWS that will be used
to communicate with the mobile app.
Testing & Staging
The mobile app will be deployed using Bitrise so that you and your team can test the
mobile application constantly throughout the project.
Deployment
Once the mobile app is ready to be released, it will be deployed to the Google Play
Store, Apple Appstore, and Huawei AppGallery.
Upstack Studio Sdn. Bhd. - https://upstackstudio.com - contact@upstackstudio.com
2

Optional Scopes
The following list indicates optional scopes that could be included in this project.
Maintenance
Any changes to the mobile app following the launch that fall out of the project scope
shall be deemed as additional maintenance works and will be charged separately.
A quotation can be drafted depending on the maintenance work involved or a monthly or
yearly maintenance plan can be discussed separately.

3

Project Management
Upstack Studio practices agile software development. We use a development process
called Scrum. The entire project is broken down into multiple 2-week-long Sprints. The
goal is to develop a deployable segment that clients can view and test what has been
completed during the Sprint Review.
Sprint Planning and Review will be held bi-weekly via Google Hangout. The purpose of
the meeting is to review work done for the sprint and to plan for the following sprint.
After the Sprint Review, the client will be given 5 working days to test the features and
report any bugs. If no bugs are reported, features will be marked as completed.

The estimated time to complete development is around 11-12 months for one developer
but with 2 developers it is around 5-6 months. The actual time to complete development
can vary depending on the actual requirements, team count, and cooperation from
Daikin Malaysia’s team.

Payment Terms
An advanced payment of 30% of the total project cost is required before the project
starts.
Then, invoices will be sent to Daikin Malaysia Sdn. Bhd. according to the payment
timetable shown below, payable via bank transfer. Payment is due 30 days after the
invoice date (NET30).
Upstack Studio will hold the ownership of source code and design assets throughout the
project. Ownership of source code and all other assets will be transferred progressively
as the invoice for milestones A to B (as detailed in the tables below) is paid in full.
Ownership of the source code for milestone C will only be transferred after the payment
for milestones C and D are received in full.
Labels will be used to illustrate deliverables in the Payment Terms table. These

The cost to complete the project consists of all source code and design assets produced
during the whole design and development period. It does not include any third-party
services or licenses such as AWS or any other services/licenses used to build the app.
These costs will be borne by Daikin Malaysia Sdn. Bhd.

Validity
This quotation is valid for 30 days from the date of this proposal.
Next Step
Feel free to reach out to us with any questions or concerns you may have. We are more
than happy to discuss it.
If you would like to move forward with the project, the next steps will include:
-
Schedule a meeting with Upstack Studio to further discuss costing and timeline
-
Once confirmed, Daikin Malaysia Sdn. Bhd. can prepare the service agreement
that incorporates this proposal for signing.
-
Once signed, an invoice for First Payment will be sent before we kick-start the
design and development work.
** Please note that projects are scheduled on a first come first serve basis. At any given
time we likely have multiple outstanding proposals, waiting for approval, so the timeline
outlined in this estimate is subject to change, should we schedule other work before
receiving approval from you.
